# AC Service Tbilisi

> Professional air conditioning installation, repair, cleaning, maintenance, and Freon refill services in Tbilisi, Rustavi, and Mtskheta, Georgia.

## Website

- https://test-acservice.vercel.app/

## About

AC Service has provided residential and commercial air conditioner services since 2019. The company specializes in installation, maintenance, diagnostics, repair, antibacterial cleaning, and system relocation.

## Core Services

- Air Conditioner Installation
- Air Conditioner Dismantling & Relocation
- Air Conditioner Cleaning & Disinfection
- Freon Refill
- Diagnostics & Repair
- PCB & Electronic Board Repair

## Service Area

- Tbilisi
- Rustavi
- Mtskheta
- Georgia

## Languages

- Georgian
- English

## Contact

- Website: https://test-acservice.vercel.app/
- Phone: +995 599 003 645
